# Custom Help Wanted Yard Signs

### Now Hiring Lawn Signs 

![Now Hiring Sign for a Cafe | Banners.com](https://lag.azureedge.net/w2p-cms-1/sliderImages/8874e5258743495da7778cefc56bfc47.jpg)

 

 

 

*   [Product Overview](#04bb2523-17d9-4ec4-8411-3ce54b299e5c)
*   [Material Options](#ae07502a-302a-4690-9fb9-30c59897f9d8)
*   [Artwork Specs](#1f24c3cb-97e0-49ad-ab93-e20524a61ffd)
*   [Production Times](#3c86b3f1-48b3-4ee3-a93e-030b55fb8793)
*   [Payment Options](#df0eb769-48ef-4a3f-a109-53cd9236aa63)
*   [Shipping Guidelines](#560bb50d-ff5f-484e-82d7-1504ac6bc58e)

#### Share Your Message With A Custom Yard Sign

\*\* All signs greater than 32" x 48" in any direction are automatically scored and folded. To score your coroplast signs, we cut through the top layer of the yard sign without cutting through the entire piece. The sign is then folded into an optimal fit to meet shipping guidelines.\*\*

\*\* If you don't want your yard signs to be scored and folded please visit our [oversized flat shipping page](https://www.banners.com/oversized-signs-flat-shipping) or contact one of our customer service representatives at: 320-391-5300. \*\*

\*\* Please note: When ordering yard signs with different designs, text, imagery, etc., these signs will be priced and processed as 1 sign per design. \*\*

Custom yard signs are a versatile promotional tool most commonly displayed in front lawns for business advertising, political promotion, real estate showings, and yard sales. Lawn signs are perfect for so many different events because they’re lightweight, easy to install, and inexpensive when compared to other signage options. They’re also incredibly effective at sharing a quick message with passing cars and pedestrians.

Here at Banners.com, we want to make designing, ordering, and displaying your yard sign easy. That’s why we offer free online templates, an intuitive online designer and real-time tracking for your order. You can also add wire installation stakes to your order to accommodate your single or double-sided yard sign.

Get started on your order for professionally designed and manufactured yard signs today.

**Did we answer all your questions?**

If not, please give us a call at [(320) 391-5300](tel:13203915300) and one of our customer service representatives will be more than happy to help you.

#### Full Color Custom Yard Signs

These signs are digitally printed in full color on a 4 mm white corrugated plastic material. This material has hollow flutes in it similar to cardboard, which run horizontally on a 4’ x 8’ sheet (the 96 in direction.)

The 4 mm corrugated plastic material is durable, lightweight, waterproof, and can be printed single sided or double sided, making this product a great option for outdoor advertising.

\*Please note, all coroplast yard signs will be cut 1/8th of an inch on each side to allow for finishing. (ex. a 18" x 24" yard sign will actually ship out to you as a 17.75" x 23.75" yard sign.) If your yard sign needs to be precise, please reach out to one of our customer service reps to discuss your specific application.\*

![Blank Coroplast Sheet](https://lag.azureedge.net/w2p-cms-1/22-10-10-blank%20corrugated%20flat%20sign-500x300.jpg)

##### Finishing Options

The following finishing options are available:

• 1/2" in white margin or a full bleed (the ink goes all the way to the edge of the sign)

• Single or double sided signs

• Yard sign accessories: H Stake 10x15, 10x24 or 10x30. Beefy Stakes. Zip Ties 12 inches - Black and Zip Ties 36 inches - White. 

#### Scoring

All signs over 32" x 48" or any sign where the H + W is 81 inches or greater are automatically scored and folded. To score your coroplast signs, we cut through the top layer of the yard sign without cutting through the entire piece. The sign is then folded into an optimal fit to meet shipping guidelines. 

If you don't want your yard signs to be scored and folded please visit our [oversized flat shipping page](https://www.banners.com/oversized-signs-flat-shipping) or contact one of our customer service representatives at: 320-391-5300.

#### Artwork Guidelines

The file that prints best is .eps converted to outline. We can also print high resolution .pdf or .jpg files. If you are unsure of the quality of your files, our professional graphic designers will be more than happy to help you.

#### Artwork/Order Proofs

If you would like to double-check your order for correct information, requesting an order proof will allow you to do that. Your order proof will include a low-resolution image of your artwork and a summary of your order (including pricing), as well as your billing and shipping information. Please note that if you request a proof, we will not send your order into production until you have sent your approval.

#### Color Match Proof System

If your project is color critical, we recommend using our Color Match Proof System, as this is the best way to ensure the color match for your specific project. For more details, please contact a customer service representative.

### Production Time Tables

We provide flexible production time ranges for you to choose from. Because it's important for you to have ultimate control over your order, our production times range from one to five business days. This allows you to make the final decision on when you need your order.

#### **1 Business Day Priority:**

Timelines can be tight. That's why we offer this zippy one day turnaround option.

![1 Business Day Priority Infographic](https://lag.azureedge.net/w2p-cms-1/22-09-14-BANS-production time infographic-1 Business Day Priority.jpg)

*   **Orders approved after 5:00 PM CST will be processed the following business day.**
*   **Emergency/same day rushes are available in some cases. Please speak with a customer service representative today for more information.**
*   **Note: The time it will take to receive your product includes the production time as well as the shipping time.**
*   **Turnaround starts from the time the file upload is complete. If an order is flagged in our prepress department or a proof is requested awaiting approval, turnaround starts from the time the approval is given.**

#### **2 Business Days Express:**

Have an extra day, but still need your products quickly? The express option is ideal for you!

![2 Business Day Express Infographic](https://lag.azureedge.net/w2p-cms-1/22-09-14-BANS-production time infographic-2 Business Days Express.jpg)

*   **Orders approved after 5:00 PM CST will be processed the following business day.**
*   **Emergency/same day rushes are available in some cases. Please speak with a customer service representative today for more information.**
*   **Note: The time it will take to receive your product includes the production time as well as the shipping time.**
*   **Turnaround starts from the time the file upload is complete. If an order is flagged in our prepress department or a proof is requested awaiting approval, turnaround starts from the time the approval is given.**

#### **3 Business Days Standard:**

This is our most popular fast turnaround option. Free and speedy enough for almost any custom order.

![3 Business Day Standard Infographic](https://lag.azureedge.net/w2p-cms-1/22-09-14-BANS-production time infographic-3 Business Days Standard.jpg)

*   **Orders approved after 5:00 PM CST will be processed the following business day.**
*   **Emergency/same day rushes are available in some cases. Please speak with a customer service representative today for more information.**
*   **Note: The time it will take to receive your product includes the production time as well as the shipping time.**
*   **Turnaround starts from the time the file upload is complete. If an order is flagged in our prepress department or a proof is requested awaiting approval, turnaround starts from the time the approval is given.**

#### **5 Business Days Saver:**

If you’re not in a rush, then you can save some money by choosing our 5-Days Saver option.

![5 Business Day Saver](https://lag.azureedge.net/w2p-cms-1/22-09-14-BANS-production time infographic-5 Business Days Saver.jpg)

*   **Orders received after 5:00 PM CST will be processed the following business day.**
*   **Emergency/same day rushes are available in some cases. Please speak with a customer service representative today for more information.**
*   **Note: The time it will take to receive your product includes the production time as well as the shipping time.**
*   **Turnaround starts from the time the file upload is complete. If an order is flagged in our prepress department or a proof is requested awaiting approval, turnaround starts from the time the approval is given.**

All yard signs must be paid for prior to being put into production. We accept Visa, MasterCard, American Express, and Discover cards. We also accept checks, which must be received before your order is put into production. [For more information on check orders, see this article on our blog.](https://blog.banners.com/2013/05/online-orders-we-now-accept-checks.html)

We will not charge your credit card until you have approved your order.

#### General Shipping Guidelines

If you have any questions about shipping, please contact customer service at [(320) 391-5300](tel:13203915300) prior to ordering. Unless otherwise specified at the time of ordering, your order will be shipped via UPS Ground. We offer a 1–3 day ground shipment to 90% of the United States.

**You will receive a tracking number once your package has been shipped.**

Shipping prices are determined by the weight and destination of the package. Additional shipping charges apply to large orders.

After products have been shipped, all shipping company terms and conditions apply for lost or delayed packages. We will not refund the banner cost if UPS or any other shipping company has a delay in your package.

Delays due to natural disasters or anything beyond our control will not result in shipping refunds. If the product is damaged in shipping, the damaged goods must be returned, and then a replacement product will be sent.

Lost packages will be replaced after the shipping company confirms loss. This generally takes 7–10 business days after the initial scheduled delivery.

**International shipping Notes:**

For international shipments, customers must provide both shipping labels and customs documentation. Currently, we only accept international shipping labels from USPS and UPS. For more details, please contact our customer service team.

#### Shipping Maps

**Vinyl Banners & Mesh Banners**

This product is produced in our Minnesota or Las Vegas facilities, whichever is more beneficial to the customer's experience based on customer location and product specifications.

**Fabric Banners**

This product is made in our Minnesota facility only.

#### Shipping Methods

We offer the following shipping methods:

Standard ( 3–5 Business Days )

Three Day ( 3 Business Days )

Two Day ( 2 Business Days )

Overnight ( 1 Business Day )

UPS Overnight AM

**Economy Shipping**

If choosing economy shipping, please add in additional postal information such as P.O. Box in the "Address Two" field on the checkout page to help ensure delivery.

Using economy shipping can also add an additional 5–10 days, depending on where the package is being shipped to.

Yard signs are a simple yet surprisingly powerful tool to put your message front and center throughout everyday spaces. Whether you're eager to sell your home, promoting a flash sale for your business, running a local mayoral campaign, or celebrating a can't-miss event like birthdays and graduations, our yard signs give you the big impact without the cost. These signs are super lightweight, all while being easy to set up, and with full CMYK color printing, they'll be catching the eyes of drivers, neighbors, and locals alike. From spotlighting seasonal deals to cheering on your favorite sports team, custom yard signs offer a creative yet unique way to share your message with the world.

## More About Custom Help Wanted & Now Hiring Lawn Signs

## ![Join Our Team - Now Hiring Yard Signs | Banners.com](https://lag.azureedge.net/w2p-cms-1/21-10-25-help-wanted-signs-1000x275-riot.jpg)

### Design Creative Now Hiring Signs Online! | [★★★★★](#product-rvws) [Leave a Review](#product-rvws)

[Signs](https://www.banners.com/) are an excellent way to say, “we’re hiring!”. Whether you need full-time, part-time, temporary, or seasonal help, now hiring signs are a cost-effective way to advertise just about any job openings!

Customize your [yard signs](https://www.banners.com/yard-signs) any way you'd like! You can add images, clipart and even some humor. Large and small businesses can each benefit from simple help wanted signage. 

Consider complementing your yard signs with attention-grabbing [now hiring banners](https://www.banners.com/help-wanted-banners) for a comprehensive recruitment strategy. 

Let’s face it, people need jobs and you really need to hire someone!  Generate interest in joining your work environment by using custom, catchy yard signs. What better way to let them know they should apply than by using now hiring signage all around your business.

Looking to attract top talent? Maximizing your hiring outreach does beyond now hiring signs. To attract stand out candidates businesses need a well rounded strategy that increases visibility and engages applicants across multiple channels. By combining online and offline efforts, hiring managers can create a stronger presence amongst competition that reaches a wider audience. Whether you’re looking to fill positions quickly or build long-term talent, utilizing diverse recruitment methods can make all the difference. Below are key strategies to help you enhance your hiring efforts and connect with the best candidates.

### Additional Hiring Methods to Support Your Help Wanted Signs

1.  **Online Job Boards:** Utilize popular online job boards like [Indeed](https://www.indeed.com/), [LinkedIn](https://www.linkedin.com/), [Ziprecruiter](https://www.ziprecruiter.com/) or local job portals to post your job openings. Link these job listings to your custom webpage about hiring signs for maximum exposure.
2.  **Social Media Campaigns:** Leverage social media platforms such as [Facebook](https://www.facebook.com), [Twitter,](https://www.twitter.com) and [Instagram](https://www.instagram.com) to announce job opportunities. Share engaging content from your webpage, like pictures of the custom signs, success stories of employees, or behind-the-scenes glimpses of your workplace. Showcasing this type of content can give your business a more personal/behind the scenes feel of what it is actually like to work there. This should help attract attractive potential candidates.
3.  **Email Newsletters:** Include information about your hiring signs service in your company's newsletters. Send updates about job openings and encourage subscribers to share the information with their networks.
4.  **Collaborate with Local Businesses:** Partner with other local businesses to cross-promote job opportunities. Share your hiring signs with them, and vice versa. Promote their job openings to your social media pages and vice versa. Doing both of these can broaden your reach within the community. 
5.  **Engage with Local Schools and Colleges:** Connect with career services at local educational institutions. Share information about your job opportunities, and consider offering discounts to student organizations for promoting your service.
6.  **Employee Referral Programs:** Encourage your current employees to refer potential candidates. Offer incentives for successful hires, and highlight this referral program on your webpage.

By incorporating some of these additional methods, you can create a comprehensive strategy that goes beyond just the webpage or your now hiring signs, effectively reaching a broader audience and attracting more potential candidates.

## Frequently Asked Questions [Return to Top](#top)

#### What are help wanted signs?

These products are just yard signs used to attract potential job applicants to your business. They are equipped with variations of “now hiring” text and bold, noticeable graphics. Looking for help wanted sign ideas? Check out one of our pre-made templates or [contact one of our professional graphic designers](https://www.banners.com/contact) for assistance.

#### What material are these hiring signs made of?

These signs are printed on heavy duty 4 millimeter corrugated plastic. This sturdy, waterproof, premium quality material looks and feels the same as cardboard.

#### What are the standard sizes for yard signs?

The most common sizes for yard signs are 12” x 18” and 18” x 24”, but we offer a variety of lawn sign sizes that range from 12” x 12” to 48” x 96”.

#### Do these signs come with stakes?

Absolutely! You can choose to add high quality wire stakes for an additional cost, but you can also order your lawn signs with no stakes and grommets in each corner if you intend to hang your signs like a now-hiring banner instead of placing them into the ground.

#### Can my signs be double sided?

Yes, we offer single sided or double sided printing for our custom yard signs.

#### How do I install my yard signs?

Installation of custom help wanted yard signs is extremely easy! The sign itself is lightweight and the wire stakes are designed to easily insert into your lawn. To get started, take your wire stake and insert it into the flutes of your lawn sign. Then insert the stakes into the ground.

Where should I display my help wanted sign?

Visibility is a sign’s best friend! Place these advertisements near the drive-thrus, the front door to your business, or even inside your store. Attract even more applicants and increase visibility by adding now hiring [feather flags](https://www.banners.com/custom-flags/feather-flags) with [cross bases](https://www.banners.com/custom-flags/base-replacements) that can be prominently displayed indoors and outdoors.

#### What if I need help designing my help wanted signs?

Use our easy to use online design tool, choose one of our premade help wanted sign templates, or work with our team of professional graphic designers to create eye-catching and creative help wanted signs. Whether you are looking to create signs with a specific color scheme, want to make your business logo stand out, or need each sign to have a slightly different design, these fully customizable signs are the perfect options to attract qualified candidates.

#### What other custom now hiring signs do you offer?

Keep your hiring campaigns cohesive and comprehensive with these additional cost effective now hiring sign ideas:

*   [Help Wanted Banners](https://www.banners.com/help-wanted-banners)
